products.title: STEMO4
products.subtitle: Step Motor Driver
products.description:
Stemo4 is a smart control element that combines driver and controller features for stepper motors used in industrial applications.

When used with its driver feature, it is managed externally by PLCs, motion control cards, or custom control cards, operating in "pulse/direction" mode. In this mode, motion control is performed by the external control element. Microstep options and motor current adjustment settings are available.

When the control feature is activated, users can write their own applications to the driver using the device's onboard logic inputs/outputs and the computer interface, gaining necessary motion control for their machinery. This eliminates the need for an additional control element (PLC, motion control card, PC, etc.), providing a significant cost advantage.

Its driver capabilities easily support many applications requiring position and precise speed control, such as labeling machines, rotary tables, cut-to-length systems, and constant-speed feeders.

Connection to operator panels is possible via the MODBUS protocol.

Thanks to the Windows-based STEMO-PS interface software developed for the driver, users can easily develop and upload their programs or control the driver directly.

Key Features:
Supports two-phase (bipolar) stepper motors,
24 - 48V motor supply voltage, 7 amps (peak) motor phase current,
Selectable microstepping: 1/2, 1/4, 1/8, 1/16, 1/32, 1/64, 1/128, 1/256,
16 different motor current adjustment values,
8 logic inputs (opto-coupler), inputs can be configured as NPN or PNP,
3 logic outputs (transistor),
2 potentiometer inputs (for reference speed or timer values),
RS485 and USB connectivity,
Operator panel connection via MODBUS protocol,
User-programmable,
Over-temperature protection.

products.title: Galvanic Isolated USB/RS485 Converter
products.subtitle: Galvanic Isolated USB to RS485 Converter

products.title: Galvanic Isolated RS232/422/485 Converter
products.subtitle: Galvanic Isolated RS232/RS422/RS485 Converter
products.description: Offers isolated and reliable conversion between different serial communication standards.

products.title: STEMO3
products.subtitle: Step Motor Driver
products.description:
Stemo3 is a smart control element that combines driver and controller features for stepper motors used in industrial applications.

When used with its driver feature, it is managed externally by PLCs, motion control cards, or custom control cards, operating in "pulse/direction" mode. In this mode, motion control is performed by the external control element. Microstep options and motor current adjustment settings are available.

When the control feature is activated, users can write their own applications to the driver using the device's onboard logic inputs/outputs and the computer interface, gaining necessary motion control for their machinery. This eliminates the need for an additional control element (PLC, motion control card, PC, etc.), providing a significant cost advantage.

Its driver capabilities easily support many applications requiring position and precise speed control, such as labeling machines, rotary tables, cut-to-length systems, and constant-speed feeders.

Connection to operator panels is possible via the MODBUS protocol.

Thanks to the Windows-based STEMO-PS interface software developed for the driver, users can easily develop and upload their programs or control the driver directly.

Key Features:
Supports two-phase (bipolar) stepper motors,
24 - 60V motor supply voltage, 7 amps (peak) motor phase current,
Selectable microstepping: 1/1, 1/2, 1/4, 1/5, 1/8, 1/10, 1/16, 1/25,
16 different motor current adjustment values,
6 logic inputs (opto-coupler), inputs can be configured as NPN or PNP,
2 logic outputs (transistor),
2 potentiometer inputs (for reference speed or timer values),
RS232 connectivity (optional: RS485, USB),
Operator panel connection via MODBUS protocol,
User-programmable,
Over-temperature protection.
